CREATE TABLE dt (timestamp Date, event_id UInt8) ENGINE = TinyLog;
SELECT * FROM dt WHERE timestamp >= '1970-01-01' AND timestamp <= '2149-06-06';
CREATE TABLE dt2 (event_id UInt8, timestamp Date) ENGINE = TinyLog;
SELECT a.timestamp, b.event_id FROM dt AS a JOIN dt2 AS b ON a.event_id = b.event_id;
WITH (SELECT MAX(timestamp) FROM dt) AS latest_date SELECT event_id FROM dt WHERE timestamp = latest_date;
SELECT timestamp, event_id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY event_id) AS event_count FROM dt;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates (temp_date Date) ENGINE = TinyLog;
SELECT temp_date FROM temp_dates WHERE temp_date < '2001-01-01' UNION SELECT timestamp FROM dt;
CREATE TABLE combined AS SELECT d.timestamp, dt.event_id FROM dt AS d JOIN dt2 AS dt ON d.event_id = dt.event_id WHERE dt.timestamp < '2023-01-01';
